ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross M. Madden, via Zoom, for Kristine S. Wong, Personal Representative.

Mr. Madden reports that there is a petition to approve status report and continue administration pending in the court's e-filing queue and offers a summary of some of the information included in the report.

The matter is continued to Oct-31-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 11/13/2006 and codicil dated 12/26/2019 are admitted to probate. Kristine S. Wong is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for 9/28/2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
